category_sources: source_facts.description says tfclean removes applied moved blocks, import blocks, and related Terraform cleanup items.
source_facts.homepage points to the official takaishi/tfclean repository.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository and matches the display name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface for tfclean.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Go package metadata for the official repository lists README sections for removing blocks and applied blocks.
source_facts.description identifies cleanup of moved/import blocks.
